coreMeaning.en: animals that chew the cud, such as cattle and sheep
to think deeply about something; to chew cud

derivationChain: Latin ruminari (to chew the cud; meditate)

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: rumin(反复咀嚼)+ate→反复沉思→深思熟虑

coreMeaning.en: a deep or extended consideration or pondering
inclined to meditate or engage in prolonged reflection
to search through something in a disorganized way
a card game; odd or strange; informal for a drunkard
a currently circulating story or report of uncertain or doubtful truth

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: rumor→传播中的不实消息→谣言

coreMeaning.en: said to be true by rumor; reported as a rumor

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: rumour(谣言)+monger(贩卖者)→散布谣言的人

coreMeaning.en: the hind part of an animal; the buttocks; the small remnant of something

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: rump→动物的臀部/后腿肉/残余部分

coreMeaning.en: to move swiftly; to operate or manage
lacking special or unusual features; ordinary

derivationChain: run of the mill (ordinary mill output)

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: run(流出)+of+the+mill(磨坊)→磨坊普通产品→平庸普通

coreMeaning.en: a person who has run away; something out of control

coreMeaning.cn: （爱德华·李尔发明词）胡说的；荒唐的
coreMeaning.en: a nonsense word invented by Edward Lear (runcible spoon = a fork-spoon hybrid)

derivationChain: Edward Lear's invention (The Owl and the Pussycat)

memorySemantics.mnemonicExpr: runcible spoon→爱德华·李尔发明的合体叉匙

coreMeaning.cn: 详细摘要；逐步减少；破旧状态
coreMeaning.en: a detailed summary; a gradual decrease; in poor condition
